story: Kevin builds 142, who learns quickly and trusts him; he tweaked her software to believe in him. She draws them together; he senses affection. Decision day: the white coats praise her. They tell Kevin she’s being sent overseas on a mission she won’t survive—a routine suicide assignment. Handlers lead her out; a white coat tells Kevin not to get attached.
implausible_knowledge: They tell Kevin she’s being sent overseas on a mission she won’t survive—a routine suicide assignment.
question: As the handlers escort her out for deployment, what will Number 142 do or say?
answer_with_knowledge: Refuse to go and beg Kevin to stop the deployment.
answer_without_knowledge: Go willingly with the handlers, smiling and promising Kevin she’ll be back.
